tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index module

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.mock_crop_data() → CropData
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_determine_optimal_leaf_area_fraction(heatfrac: float, s1: float, s2: float) → None

ensure that optimal leaf area fraction is properly calculated by calc_optimal_leaf_area_fraction()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_calc_shape_log(heatfrac: float, areafrac: float) → None

ensure that log terms are calculated correctly

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_error_calc_shape_log(heatfrac: float, areafrac: float) → None

ensure that the errors are thrown for inappropriate input to calc_shape_log()

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_determine_lai_shapes(heatfrac1: float, heatfrac2: float, areafrac1: float, areafrac2: float) → None
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_error_determine_lai_shape(heatfrac1: float, heatfrac2: float, areafrac1: float, areafrac2: float, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

check that invalid input to test_error_calc_shape_parameters throws errors

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_determine_senescent_leaf_area_index(heatfrac: float, senheatfrac: float, optareafrac: float) → None

heatfrac is fr_PHU senheatfrac is fr_PHU,sen optareafrac is LAI_mx

tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_error_determine_senescent_leaf_area_index(heatfrac: float, senheatfrac: float, optareafrac: float) → None
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_determine_max_leaf_area_change(frac: float, prev_frac: float, max_lai: float, prev_lai: float) → None
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_determine_canopy_height(max_can_height: float, opt_leaf_area_frac: float) → None
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_error_determine_canopy_height(max_can_height: float, opt_leaf_area_frac: float) → None
tests.soil_crop_tests.crop_tests.test_leaf_area_index.test_grow_canopy(mock_crop_data: CropData, heatfrac: float, previous_leaf_area_index: int, previous_optimal_leaf_area_fraction: int) → None

Integration test for leaf area processes via grow_canopy().
